svg.title: Smart Shop Platform — VPC and subnet layout
svg.desc: One VPC (10.0.0.0/16) across two availability zones. Each AZ has one public subnet and one private subnet. Single NAT Gateway in AZ-1 public subnet. ALB spans both public subnets. All services, RDS, MSK, and ElastiCache live in private subnets.

g.text: Application load balancer (spans both public subnets)
